# @json-express/logger-pino — AI Context

Production logger built on pino: leveled JSON logs, pretty dev output, stdout or file destinations. Same automatic `traceId` correlation as the default logger.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/logger-pino
```
Discovery is automatic; with logger-console also installed choose `jex.logger=@json-express/logger-pino`. **Never import pino or this package in application logic.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.log.level` | `info` | pino level (`debug`, `info`, `warn`, `error`) |
| `jex.log.path` | `./logs` | `stdout` / `stderr` for 12-factor streams; a directory (writes `app.log`) or a `.log` file path for file mode |
| `jex.log.pretty` | true in development | Human-readable colorized output (stdout/stderr mode) |
